subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken on 1915-02-05
subcodes.first_line: May God bestow a little pity and compassion to these artful, deceiving kings and emperors who style themselves lords and masters of the world
subcodes.subjects: @nationalism; love of country, @human reality created in the image of God, @greed; envy; covetousness; attachment to the world, @war and peace
